mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan ( plan_id, user_id, plan_type, plan_content, plan_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{userId}, #{planType}, #{planContent}, #{planStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT plan_id, user_id, plan_type, plan_content, plan_status, create_time, update_time FROM plan WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
